message:
refactor: second pass cleanup from code review

- Simplify preferVertical expression (was tautologically complex, reduces to just hasVerticalGap)
- Remove dead stat() sidecar check in fromFile — result was discarded
- Replace per-ID Date.now() syscall with session seed constant
- Replace map+spread arrow bounds with simple min/max loop
- Move nodeById map inside groups branch (only used there)
- Unify escapeAttr into escapeXml (was a strict subset)
- Skip edgeCounts first pass when all edges have Graphviz routes
- Extract callWasm helper to dedupe routeArrows/validate/renderSvg
